name: run_id
description: Pipeline run id; joins to dead_letter.run_id.

name: reference_digest
description: SHA-256 of the canonical reference sample (provenance).

name: reference_table
description: Source table the reference rows were SELECTed from.

name: landing_table
description: Destination table for valid synthetic rows.

name: model_uri
description: gs:// URI of the LLM weights used.

name: env
description: dev | uat | prd — threshold tier applied.

name: num_rows_requested
description: Rows the run was asked to generate.

name: valid_count
description: Rows that passed all Mode-A checks and landed.

name: blocker_count
description: DLQ records whose rule_id is BLOCKER-severity.

name: dlq_by_rule
description: JSON map rule_id -> count (PARSE_JSON to query).

name: blocker_failure_ratio
description: Configured gate for this env (from thresholds.yml).

name: created_at
description: Row write time (UTC); DAY partition key.
